title: Visible Ore Pack
description: Changes the Ore textures to make them more Visible
body:
# The Visible Ores Pack

**_The Visible Ores Pack makes all Ores more Visible which is good for mining_**

_from Snackse_

**Have fun :)**

![In Mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4dcb44bf1580170fe61343331620f9726b8160c_0.webp)

**With the Pack:**
